title: ベストショットの行方

text_block_list.text:
I'm out walking with Meisho Doto, when I hear a
whisper calling to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I know this is sudden, but do you have a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I believe this wallet belongs to Doto... Here, please take
it, but don't say anything!
choice_data_list: But she's right next to us.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, hello. I'm right here...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I am very aware of that, but... Nghhh... I could never hand something directly to an Umamusume with these grubby otaku mitts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, just breathing the same air is doing an
absolute number on my pulse!

I talk Agnes Digital down from her state of
induced panic, successfully reuniting the wallet
with its owner.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad you made the effort to bring it back
to me. Ohhh, thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Also... I would like to know if you want anything
in return. I should... return the... favor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eep?! I, I can't accept anything! Your words of
thanks are good enough, if not too much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-th-that can't be enough! Surely, there must
be... something I can do...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Asdfsdfg?!! Stop... you're too cute! I must enshrine that expression into my mind's shrine foreverrr!!1!1

This conversation isn't going anywhere. Maybe if I
offer something that Agnes Digital would enjoy...
choice_data_list: How about I take a photo of the two of you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? That won't be infringing on any laws, will it?! Is this really, really, really really allowed?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep... a photo! I'll... do my best!

We change locations to get a good shot, but
Meisho Doto is stiff as a rock.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwah... Uh... Uh... Uh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hnngh! She's so timid I could die—a goddess lives
among us! Cuteness radiates from her every pore!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huuuh?! C-cute?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
OmiGOSH!!! Look at her blush! She can barely
contain her excitement, and she knows it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wait, I'm blushing?! This is so embarrassing!
choice_data_list: All right, let's see if we can get a smile!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uwahh! O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uh... like this? Hm... hm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aghskdlf! That desperate attempt at a smile...
Doto, you're so so so cuuuuute!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what? ...Wait, wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I c-can't smile?! Wh-what do I do nooow?!
choice_data_list: Try to picture a smile in your head.
Why not go for a little run?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... o... okay! Um... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: HAAAAH ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WAIT! Is th-that, by chance, your impression of
Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! Apologies for the trouble, but her
smile and laugh was the most memorable to me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! HAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... a-am I smiling now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So precious... I'd follow you forever... N-not that I
wasn't already following you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: HAAAH HA—Cough, sputter!

Too much laughing leaves Meisho Doto in a
coughing fit, but she manages to get through the
photo.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'll clear my mind with some running!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaghgh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...I th-think I went a little overboard. Huff... Puff... I'm at my limit.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whoa whoa! My legs got all tangled... Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I'm s-so so sorry! I didn't mean to hug you... So, so sorry about this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ack, gugh, no! This is taboo! We've crossed the
line that never should be cr... cr... cr...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heh... hehe! No! This is wrong! So wrong! But I
can't stop smiling! ♪

What a heartwarming scene. I take a picture of
the moment to give to them.
